extraction.one_line_summary: MODOLO Sacha won from a reduced peloton sprint after a half-hearted chase allowed the breakaway containing GC threat O'Connor to persist until 12km, forcing mixed team cooperation.
tactical_patterns: DQS chased with Almeida in points jersey to protect GC despite break containing O'Connor, revealing prioritization confusion.
Jack Bauer's late bridge attempt at 12km triggered sprint teams to finally commit, showing tactical trigger point.
Jumbo-Visma disrupted chase despite Volkswagen breakaway rider showing Teunissen protection tactics translating across teammates.

rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: virtual race leader in break forced GC teams into chase despite marginal threat, confirms aggressive positioning instinct
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: DNS after two lackluster days citing illness suspicion, reveals fragility contradicting sprint favorite status
rider_signals.COKAERT Bryan: negative: not functioning or firing on all cylinders despite flat sprint opportunity, significant form concern
rider_signals.MODOLO Sacha: positive: won after long drought suggests peaking form often overlooked in veteran sprinters
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: neutral: only 4 seconds behind leader pre-TT while managing points jersey suggests strong GC position
